public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hazard reader.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a hazard reader still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hazard reader in and around Nomdara Northern Tundra Circuit, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Nomdara Northern Tundra Circuit workable through the obligations of hazard reader while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Nomdara Northern Tundra Circuit, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of hazard reader visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Torv Waycord can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Torv Waycord can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Torv Waycord carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara Northern Tundra Circuit: the part of Nomdara Northern Tundra Circuit where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
